description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstract representation of a human figure, with elongated and warped limbs and body parts. The form is stretched and twisted, making it difficult to discern typical anatomical features, but there are hints of a torso, arms, and legs. The surface texture is smooth with some areas appearing slightly matte, and the coloration is a mix of pale, flesh-like tones with some darker and reddish patches. There are no clear facial features, clothing details, or accessories visible due to the extreme deformation. The structure is thin and spindly in many areas, with large gaps and open spaces between the forms. Overall, the object gives the impression of a glitched or corrupted digital scan of a pedestrian adult.
description: A highly distorted, abstract humanoid form with elongated limbs and warped features, featuring smooth, pale surfaces and irregular structure.
description_view_0: From this angle, the elongated limbs and twisted torso are most prominent, with thin, stretched elements extending outward.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the flatness and open gaps in the structure, with the warped torso and limbs visible in profile.
description_view_2: Here, the spindly legs and the abstract, angular shapes of the body are most apparent, with a sense of depth from the overlapping forms.
description_view_3: This view highlights the back and side of the figure, showing the irregular, stretched surfaces and the disconnected appearance of the limbs.
